title: FAQ 7 - Payroll Debt and Financing Ability
ocr_text:
THE TAX & MONEY SHOW
Tuesdays at 9PM
Eastern Time
LIVE ON: FreedomReport.ca
Question #6
Can I transfer or restructure my corporation to escape payroll debt?
• Is it legal to sell my corporation with debt?
• Can I move my assets into a new company without CRA reversing the transaction?

title: FAQ 7 - Payroll Debt and Financing Ability
ocr_text:
THE TAX & MONEY SHOW
Tuesdays at 9PM Eastern Time
LIVE ON: FreedomReport.ca
Question #7
How does payroll debt affect my ability to get financing or keep operating?
• Will banks see CRA liens?
• Will clients or suppliers find out if there's a payroll debt problem?
